extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter survived selective climbs to win final sprint, launching blind-side attack inside final kilometer while YATES Adam abandoned mid-race.
tactical_patterns: SAGAN positioned 10th with 1km remaining, moved blind-side at right-hand turn to steal sprint, revealing delayed positioning tactic.
YATES abandonment mid-stage eliminated QUINTANA's only close GC threat at 33 seconds, removing defensive pressure from race leader.
QUINTANA attacked on steep climb sections despite already controlling race, suggesting priority on dominance display over energy conservation.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: abandoned mid-race while sitting 33 seconds behind in GC, eliminating himself as only serious threat to Quintana
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: proved climbing form sufficient to survive selective mountain stage, then had power reserves to win sprint finish
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: attacked unnecessarily on steep climb sections while already controlling race, demonstrating exceptional form surplus
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: second place plus time bonuses reduced GC gap from 56 to 50 seconds, showing better late-stage legs than expected
